title: Tactical Overhaul
description: Converts bows, crossbows, and enchantments into a modern tactical arsenal with multi-language support.🛡️🔫
body: **🔥 Bows to GUNS! 🔫 Transform weaponry with Tactical Overhaul. 🎖️ Realistic firearms, military enchants & 8+ language support. 🏹 Tactical ammo for survival/PvP. Get tactical now! 🎯** Special thanks to BetaTestMCNuggets for some models! 🛡️🔫
